title: anacardium corymbosum
intro: Anacardium corymbosum, also known as the cashew tree, is a tropical evergreen tree native to Brazil and the Caribbean. The medicinal properties of Anacardium corymbosum are attributed to its seeds and oil, which have antimicrobial, antifungal, and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Anacardium corymbosum include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Anacardium corymbosum is typically prepared as an oil or cream for topical use, although it can also be consumed as a tea or powder in moderation.
